# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- 使用者希望介面現在與後續都採用暗色系主題（WPF 專案）。
- WPF UI 顏色應具有高對比度且清晰可讀，同時保持暗色主題。
- All Python scripts and processes have been deprecated in favor of native C# implementations. Do not re-introduce external scripting or shell-outs.
- All code should strictly follow standard C# and .NET Framework 4.7.2 design patterns.
- Please use semantic and logical commits when pushing changes.
- Ensure that WPF controls utilize WrapPanel for dynamically reflowing items and do not overlap components such as vertical ScrollBars on small screen spaces.
- Always use spaces for indentation.
